steps.title: Connect finding to trade
steps.content: The earlier sentences explain how the team traced the planks to the Jura region of France. The underlined sentence then uses that evidence to infer something broader about Roman trade routes.

steps.title: Reject misread functions
steps.content: Choice B misreads boat transport as boat construction. Choice C shifts to why the planks were oak. Choice D confuses modern subway construction with the Roman evidence. The underlined sentence presents a conclusion from the team's findings. The answer is A.
